series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains all electronic databases and tables generated and retained in the Multi-Agency Radio Communications System (MARCS) Computer Aided Dispatch (CAD) system. Some data included in these tables are agency incident data, LEADS transaction data only, and unit/radio Automated Resource Locator (ARL) data.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Records will be purged daily on a rolling three (3) year schedule ; Paper: stored electronically
